prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次约5958→5245→10507→6808→6375名，波动较大；2023年出现异常高位（10507名）后迅速回落，近两年呈小幅下降趋势（位次数字减小），2025年基准约6375名；该校在天津招生计划2021年17人、2022年12人、2023年13人、2024年10人、2025年8人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026年计划恢复至10人（较2025年扩招25%），扩招将增加录取机会，但竞争格局仍受其他因素影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 陕西师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第62–71名区间（2026年约第63名），在师范类院校中位居前列，对中等分数段考生有较强吸引力；2024年该校曾出现师德师风负面舆情（副教授被举报性骚扰），对短期报考心理可能产生轻微抑制；抖音综合热度排名第15（高热），主要源于手写录取通知书等正面事件，整体关注度较高；第五轮学科评估中，中国语言文学、心理学、教育学获评A-，为该校王牌学科，与招生专业中的中国语言文学类直接对应，对文科倾向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育大类社会热度从2022年"推荐"（70.76）降至2024年"分化观望"（55.84），呈持续降温态势；天津市2026年高考报名人数约8.2万人（较2025年增长约14%），考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6375名、2026年计划扩招25%、天津市考生总数大幅增长约14%、师范专业热度降温及学校声誉波动等因素，扩招带来的录取机会增加与考生竞争加剧相互对冲，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移（位次数字增大）；预测最低位次约7261名，区间6761–7761名。

- 中国语言文学类（历史必选）。

- 数学类（物理、化学必选）
- 物理学类（物理、化学必选）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约7261名，区间6761–7761名。建议位次在区间内的考生以二档专业（数学类、物理学类）为主攻方向，一档中国语言文学类作为冲刺（需历史必选），三档外国语言文学类（英语）和地理科学类作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<6761名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 5958 → 5245 → 10507 → 6808 → 6375, with significant fluctuations; an abnormal high ranking (10507) occurred in 2023, followed by a rapid decline, and in the past two years, there has been a slight downward trend (ranking number decreasing). The baseline for 2025 is approximately 6375. The enrollment plan for this university in Tianjin was 17 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 8 in 2025, showing a gradual reduction trend. In 2026, the plan is to restore to 10 (a 25% increase compared to 2025), which will increase admission opportunities, but the competitive landscape is still affected by other factors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shaanxi Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 62–71 range in recent years (approximately 63rd in 2026), ranking among the top in normal universities, strongly attracting middle-score candidates. In 2024, the university experienced negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics (an associate professor was reported for sexual harassment), which may have a slight inhibitory effect on short-term application psychology. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 15th (high heat), mainly due to positive events such as handwritten admission letters, overall high attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chinese Language and Literature, Psychology, and Education were rated A-, which are the university's flagship disciplines, directly corresponding to the Chinese Language and Literature category in the enrollment majors, strongly attracting liberal arts-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the normal/education major category has declined from 'recommended' (70.76) in 2022 to 'differentiated wait-and-see' (55.84) in 2024, showing a continuous cooling trend. The number of candidates for the 2026 Tianjin college entrance examination is approximately 82,000 (an increase of about 14% compared to 2025), with a significant expansion in candidate scale, intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 6375, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 25%, a significant increase of about 14% in the total number of candidates in Tianjin, the cooling of normal major popularity, and fluctuations in university reputation, the increased admission opportunities from expansion and the intensified competition among candidates offset each other. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7261, with a range of 6761–7761.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Geography Science (Geography required).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 7261, range 6761–7761. It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Physics) as the main direction, Tier 1 Chinese Language and Literature as a sprint (requires History), and Tier 3 Foreign Language and Literature (English) and Geography Science as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6761) can focus on sprinting for the flagship Tier 1 major.
